description: Connect AI model plans via a configurable vendor profile.
commands.coding-plans.manage.title: Manage Coding Plans Configuration
configuration.title: Coding Plans
configuration.coding-plans.vendors.descr: Configure AI model vendors with their endpoints and models.
configuration.coding-plans.vendors.defau: Default temperature for this vendor. Models can override it individually. Recommended: 0.1-0.3 for coding, 0.3-0.5 for more creative output.
Default top-p for this vendor. Models can override it individually. Recommended: 1.0 for coding, 0.9-1.0 when balancing creativity and stability.
configuration.coding-plans.vendors.model: Per-model temperature override. Inherits vendor defaultTemperature when omitted.
Per-model top-p override. Inherits vendor defaultTopP when omitted.
Must match a vendor name in coding-plans.vendors.
providers.codingPlans.config.apiKey.desc: API key for the selected vendor (stored securely).
configuration.coding-plans.commitMessage: Show the "Generate Commit Message" command in Source Control and Command Palette.
When enabled, read up to the latest 7 commit messages and mimic their writing style for generated commit messages.
Preferred vendor name for commit message generation (e.g. Zhipu). Leave empty to always prompt.
Preferred model name for commit message generation (e.g. glm-4-flash). Used together with modelVendor.
Advanced commit-message options as a JSON object (prompt, maxDiffLines, pipelineMode, summary* thresholds, max bullet count, subject length, validation switches, llmMaxPromptLength budget).
configuration.coding-plans.logLevel.desc: Controls the minimum log level written to the Coding Plans output channel.
